Considered Real Estate
But Unsure Where to Start?
If you’re like many, you would like to preserve and grow your wealth. But where do you even start?
As you likely know, Real Estate is often more time intensive than it appears from a distance. That is why our clients look for an easier way to invest.
At Peoples Capital Group we are a Vertically Integrated Real Estate company designed to enable every qualified individual and Group to have real estate in their portfolio, fully managed for them.
By handling the work for our clients, we make building wealth through real estate highly achievable.

Why Peoples Capital Group?
25+ Years of Experience
When helping it’s clients invest in real estate, Peoples Capital Group draws on over twenty five years of experience and expertise in the field. We’ve seen what works and what doesn’t work – from not just our own efforts but from our competition and those who came before us. We use that knowledge and skill to help our Clients achieve their Real Estate Goals.
We Source Discounted Opportunities
The team at Peoples Capital Group is highly experienced in sourcing discounted, off market properties for sale that the average investor does not have access to. Through our decades long relationships, we are privately notified of properties for sale where the seller is quite motivated and willing to sell at a discounted price. Through our institutional level due diligence process, we underwrite nearly 100 opportunities to bring our clients one well vetted deal at a discounted price.

The Process
4 EASY STEPS
1
DISCOVERY CALL
We’ll start with a qualification call. We want to know your investment needs and credentials
2
APPROVAL TO INVEST
Our team will process the information to determine the investment opportunity you may qualify for
3
INVESTMENT
Once your investment is made you will be provided monthly updates, as well as, quarterly reporting and cash flow
4
WEALTH GROWTH & PRESERVATION
You can lean back as a real estate investor, knowing that your money is hard at work for you in Preserving & Growing your wealth in the

Want to Know More About
Our Exclusive New Investment Opportunity
Investing in real estate as an individual is undoubtedly harder than when investing with a Group. This is because all of the work, expertise and time is provided by the Group rather than the sole individual. This gives the individual the free time to focus on other important things in their life – what means the most to them –  rather than spend their time managing all the intricacies of a piece of real estate. Though often worrisome at first, by investing your money with a real estate Group or Syndicate, like Peoples Capital Group, an individual often comes to the realization that they do not need to be hands on with all of their real estate investments.
Review PCG's Latest Opportunity

How much do I need to get started?
Peoples Capital Group requires a minimum investment of $30,000 to get started.
